title: Pakistan Looks to Play Peacemaker Between U.S. and Iran, Again
summary_full: After talks in Islamabad last weekend led to a two-week cease-fire, Pakistan is offering to host another round in an attempt to sustain continuing peace efforts.
summary_public: After talks in Islamabad last weekend led to a two-week cease-fire, Pakistan is offering to host another round in an attempt to sustain continuing peace efforts.

IR.label: neutral
